ddls:
CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "etiology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated etiology */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported for the outbreak */,
  "outbreak_year" INTEGER /* Year the outbreak occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the outbreak */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the outbreak */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the outbreak (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_etiology_id FOREIGN KEY ("etiology_id") REFERENCES etiologies ("etiology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "etiologies" (
  "etiology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each etiology */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pathogen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathogen */,
  "common_sources" TEXT /* Common sources of the pathogen (e.g., poultry, produce) */,
  "transmission_methods" TEXT /* Common methods of transmission (e.g., contaminated food, person-to-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("etiology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributing factor */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the contributing factor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the contributing factor (e.g., food handling, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_factors" (
  "outbreak_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak-factor relationship */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak associated */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributing factor associated */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the contributing factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_factors_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_factors_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated outbreak */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms presented by the patient */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the patient was hospitalized */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., confirmed, suspected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., city, state) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., local, state, federal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated outbreak */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency that reported the outbreak */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, submitted, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_reports_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES reporting_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_reports_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the symptom (e.g., gastrointestinal, respiratory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_symptoms" (
  "case_symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-symptom relationship */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom associated */,
  "symptom_description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_symptom_id FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_id") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated outbreak */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., recall, public warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the intervention (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_types" (
  "outbreak_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak type */,
  "outbreak_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the outbreak type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outbreak type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_outbreak_types" (
  "outbreak_outbreak_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak-outbreak type relationship */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak associated */,
  "outbreak_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak type associated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_outbreak_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_outbreak_types_outbreak_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_type_id") REFERENCES outbreak_types ("outbreak_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_outbreak_types_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id")
)
